founders.bio:
I’m a passionate technologist currently working as the CTO, where I focus on building scalable solutions and driving innovation. A lot of my mindset comes from being a huge Lionel Messi and FC Barcelona fan—I believe in consistency, teamwork, and always striving to perform at the highest level. 

From following football with dedication to leading technology initiatives, I’ve learned to combine strategic thinking with a hands-on approach to solve real problems. I enjoy learning new things, working with strong teams, and building solutions that make a meaningful impact on the organization’s growth.

teamLead.name: Ayush Paradkara
teamLead.bio:
I’m a passionate software engineer focused on building scalable and maintainable applications using modern technologies like Java, Spring Boot, and Angular. I enjoy working across the full stack, developing robust backend services as well as interactive frontend experiences using TypeScript-based frameworks. 

 

 

My experience includes designing and developing microservices-based architectures, building RESTful APIs, and working with both relational and NoSQL databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. I actively use tools like Git, GitHub, Splunk, and Postman to streamline development, debugging, and collaboration in real-world projects. 

 

 

I believe in writing clean, efficient, and production-ready code while continuously improving system performance and reliability. I am always eager to learn new technologies, solve complex problems, and contribute to building systems that are scalable, efficient, and aligned with business needs.

members.name: Bhumi Singh
members.bio:
Hi, my name is Bhumi Singh. I am a Java full-stack developer with hands-on experience in building scalable and efficient applications. 

I have worked as a Backend Developer Intern at Cloud Nexus, where I developed and maintained backend services and APIs, and collaborated on full-stack projects. My core expertise lies in Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, and REST APIs, where I focus on building secure and high-performance backend systems. 

On the frontend side, I work with React, Angular ,HTML, and CSS to create responsive and user-friendly interfaces. 

I am also experienced in working with databases like MySQL and MongoDB, and have hands-on exposure to Docker and AWS for application deployment. 

Additionally, I have built projects like a Medical Job Portal and an AI-powered Assessment System, where I implemented scalable architecture, role-based access control, and efficient data handling.

members.name: Ashutosh Dwivedi
members.bio:
I’m a passionate software engineer focused on building reliable and scalable backend systems using modern technologies like Java and Spring Boot. I enjoy designing microservices-based architectures, developing robust APIs, and working with distributed systems to create efficient and maintainable applications. 

  

My experience includes working with cloud platforms such as Azure, implementing CI/CD pipelines, and collaborating with teams to deliver production-ready solutions. I have also worked with event-driven architectures using Kafka, enabling high-performance communication between services. 

  

I strongly believe in continuous learning and practical problem solving. Whether it’s optimizing backend performance, improving system reliability, or adopting new technologies, I strive to build solutions that are scalable, efficient, and aligned with business goals. 

  

From developing backend services to working with modern cloud and DevOps practices, I focus on creating impactful systems that support innovation and long-term growth

members.name: Affan Ahmad
members.bio:
Hi, my name is Affan Ahmad. I am a B.Tech Computer Science Engineering student with hands-on experience in full stack and backend development, currently working as a Full Stack Developer Intern at CloudNexus. In this role, I have been supporting BNY (Bank of New York) applications, where I worked on services like rest-collateral-service, general-stats-service, SwiftMessageProcessor, and gcl-trade-processor. My work involves using Java, Spring Boot, Angular, Splunk, GitLab, and CI/CD pipelines to develop features, resolve production issues, and support enterprise-level applications. 

  

I have strong knowledge of Java, Spring Boot Microservices, REST APIs, Apache Kafka, MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. I am comfortable working on both backend and frontend technologies, and I enjoy building scalable, secure, and maintainable applications. Along with development, I also have experience in production support, debugging, log analysis, and deployment workflows. 

  

To strengthen my technical foundation, I earned the Oracle Certified Foundations Associate certification with 95%, and I have also completed certifications in Programming in Java and Spring Boot Microservices. These certifications have helped me improve my understanding of core Java concepts, backend architecture, and enterprise application development. 

  

I am passionate about learning new technologies, solving real-world problems, and contributing to impactful software projects. My goal is to grow as a Java Full Stack / Backend Developer and work on systems that are reliable, scalable, and business-focused.
